name: io.github.astandrik/local-ydb-mcp
title: Local YDB MCP
description: Operate local-ydb deployments through local or SSH-backed MCP tools.

environmentVariables.name: LOCAL_YDB_TOOLKIT_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a local-ydb-toolkit config JSON file.

environmentVariables.name: LOCAL_YDB_MCP_CONTENT_FORMAT
environmentVariables.description: Optional LLM-facing tool response text format. Use toon to prefer TOON for the second text content block, with JSON fallback if TOON cannot round-trip losslessly; omit or set json for pretty JSON. MCP JSON-RPC and structuredContent stay JSON.
